title: Vibrant Seamless Pattern Features Variety Cartoonish Flowers
sourceTitle: Vibrant Seamless Pattern Features Variety Cartoonish Flowers
prompt: A vibrant, seamless pattern features a variety of cartoonish flowers with expressive faces. The flowers are rendered in bold, saturated colors like pink, orange, yellow, and blue. Their petals are stylized, some appearing spiky and others rounded. The faces are simple yet emotive, with large eyes, rosy cheeks, and various expressions ranging from happy and sleepy to sad and even a bit menacing with bared teeth. Interspersed among the flowers are stylized leaves and foliage in dark blue and pink, adding depth and contrast to the composition. The overall style is playful and whimsical, with a slightly retro or folk-art feel. --ar 1:1 --tile --raw --sref 750957149 --stylize 250 --hd
